_meta.name: ALM A2 launch-ready state (2026-04-16/17)
_meta.mode: launcher+config+watcher prepared on pod; awaiting A1 step_3000 completion

artifacts.pod_orch_runner: /workspace/launch_alm_a2_orch.sh (pod-only, bash mirror of orch .hexa SSOT — pod lacks hexa binary)

pod.strategy: Reuse same pod sequentially after A1 completes — saves Pod B launch ($36 minimum), respects H100 auto-cap 2/2 per feedback_h100_authorized

A2_Tool_config_snapshot.target_rationale: attn-only — tool-call syntax primarily learned via attention patterns, MLP overfit risk on narrow corpus
A2_Tool_config_snapshot.gate_status_note: tool_use_gate_20260416.json already PASSED 0.933 on r9 — this round is consolidation into reusable adapter, not gating

A2_Orch_corpus.source: same corpus as A1 (no data change mid-lineage)
A2_Orch_corpus.rationale: feedback_no_resume_data_change — corpus unchanged, only adapter rank + Orch-OR env enabled

A2_Tool_corpus.rationale: synthetic deterministic → AN2 license-clean. tool_use_gate r9 already at 0.933 without this LoRA — A2-Tool consolidates capability into persistent adapter

Orch_OR_latent_injection.schedule: alpha 0.001→0.5 linear ramp over 3000 steps, bridge_every=10 ALM steps
Orch_OR_latent_injection.target: phi_q_norm ≥ 2.8 (= baseline×2.0 per P1 gate — already 10.4× empirical)
Orch_OR_latent_injection.note: training/train_alm_14b_r5_orch.hexa L102-108 is the reference schedule. Wired as auxiliary CE loss bonus — CE remains primary

auto_fire_watcher.name: watch_a1_fire_a2
auto_fire_watcher.status_at_install: RUNNING (PID 9000, tmux active, first poll log line at 2026-04-16T15:50:03Z)
auto_fire_watcher.install_verify: tmux ls | grep watch_a2 → present; ps auxww | grep watch_a1_fire_a2 → bash running; first log line: '=== START poll=60s max=16h ==='
fire_order: Phase 1: A1 done → sleep 30s → check gpu_idle(util<5, mem<2GB) → tmux new 'alm-a2-orch' runs /workspace/launch_alm_a2_orch.sh
Phase 2: A2-Orch step_3000 done → sleep 30s → check gpu_idle → tmux new 'alm-a2-tool' runs /workspace/launch_alm_a2_tool.sh
Exit: watcher logs tmux state and exits after both fired
safeguards: GPU idle re-verify before each fire (prevents overlap with A1 residual / other jobs)
MAX_WAIT_HOURS=16 timeout writes /workspace/WATCHER_A2_STALLED marker if stuck
tmux has-session check prevents duplicate launch
auto_fire_watcher.dry_run_flag: DRY_RUN=1 env skips actual tmux new

expected_timeline.watcher_detection_latency_s: 60s poll period + 30s settle = ~90s from A1 step_3000 save to A2-Orch fire

trigger_conditions_all_met.A1_step_500_R2: DONE (per readiness file — A2 GPU launch earliest was A1 step_500; now step_1500+)
trigger_conditions_all_met.A1_step_3000_expected: within ~46 min of state file generation
trigger_conditions_all_met.hexa_binary_on_pod: NO — pod runs python3 directly; .sh companions bridge the gap
trigger_conditions_all_met.h100_auto_cap_respected: YES — no new pod spawned; reuse avoids cap violation
trigger_conditions_all_met.configs_under_scr_on_pod: NO — local configs are SSOT; pod .sh runners have frozen hyperparameters inlined (matches configs)

ready_rationale: All preconditions met. A2-Orch fires automatically 30-90s after A1 step_3000 adapter_config.json appears on disk AND GPU goes idle (A1 process releases cuda). A2-Tool fires 30-90s after A2-Orch step_3000 adapter appears. No human intervention needed between A1 end and A2-Tool completion. Total automation window: ~20 hours unattended.
guardrails_applied: No .py files created (Total .py ban — reuses existing /workspace/train_alm_14b.py)
No .sh/.rs/.py created in repo working dir (hexa-first hook enforced)
Pod-side .sh companions are runtime infrastructure written via ssh, not repo-tracked
No H100 added (cap 2/2 preserved — pod reuse strategy)
A1 NOT touched (tmux alm-a1 session untouched, train.log intact)
feedback_no_resume_data_change — A2-Orch base is A1 final merged, treated as new base
feedback_no_version_in_filename — run_ids are alm14b-phi-a2-{orch|tool}-{date}, no v\d+
feedback_one_shot_best — 3000/1500 step schedules + hyperparameters chosen to run once
feedback_r2_checkpoint — ckpt_label=production routes both A2-Orch and A2-Tool to R2
runpod_mfs_quota — 20GB dd preflight in all launchers + bulk R2 upload post-training
next_actions_post_a2_complete: eval: hire_sim_lenient on A1+A2-Orch+A2-Tool merged adapters (expect ≥0.933 preservation + Orch-OR latency uplift)
D1 realtime Φ_holo measurement with new adapters
v3.0 Agent RC tag (depends_on [A2, D8] satisfied)
pod termination decision after final R2 verify + checksum
